mapper.select: SELECT DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, NAME AS name, TITLE AS title, DEPARTMENT AS department, HOSPITAL AS hospital, AVATAR_ID AS avatarId, INTRODUCTION AS introduction, SPECIALTIES AS specialties, RATING AS rating, CONSULTATION_COUNT AS consultationCount, STATUS AS status FROM DIABETES_DOCTOR.DOCTORS WHERE DOCTOR_ID = #{doctorId} AND IS_DELETED = 0
